description_long: This house features a sprawling, multi-sectioned layout with a combination of flat and hipped roofs, giving it a modern yet traditional appearance. The exterior is clad in light-colored siding with a turquoise base trim, and large rectangular windows are distributed across all sides, providing ample natural light. The front entryway is marked by a prominent set of turquoise steps leading up to a recessed door, flanked by wide windows. The structure includes several protruding wings and alcoves, creating a complex footprint and multiple rooflines. The rear of the house reveals an open patio or sunroom area with visible interior furnishings, suggesting a focus on indoor-outdoor living. The overall design is characterized by clean lines, functional spaces, and a blend of contemporary and classic residential elements.
description: A large, multi-winged house with light siding, turquoise trim, and a mix of flat and hipped roofs. Features include large windows, a prominent front entry with steps, and an open rear patio area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with turquoise steps, large windows, and the central section of the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the hipped roof section, side windows, and the depth of the house's layout.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open patio or sunroom area, interior furnishings, and multiple window arrangements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view revealing the flat roof sections, additional windows, and the extended wing structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door accessed by wide turquoise steps, flanked by large windows, no porch or columns
